<?php

function php_snmp_read_property($obj_id, $property_name) {
    static $properties = array();
    if (!isset($GLOBALS['globalProperties'])) {
        $GLOBALS['globalProperties'] = &$properties;
    }
    return call_user_func_array($GLOBALS['globalProperties'][$property_name], array($obj_id));
}

function php_snmp_write_property(&$obj, $property_name, $value) {
    static $properties = array();
    if (!isset($GLOBALS['globalProperties'])) {
        $GLOBALS['globalProperties'] = &$properties;
    }
    call_user_func_array($GLOBALS['globalProperties'][$property_name], array($obj, $value));
}

function php_snmp_add_property(&$properties, $name, $fn_get, $fn_set) {
    if (!isset($properties[$name])) {
        $properties[$name] = array(
            'get' => $fn_get,
            'set' => $fn_set
        );
    }
}

$property_name = 'number';
$value = php_snmp_read_property('1234', $property_name);
echo $value;

if ($value == 100) {
    php_snmp_write_property($value, $property_name, 50);
}

function example_add_property(&$properties, $name, $fn_get, $fn_set) {
    $properties[$name] = array(
        'get' => function($obj_id) use ($name) {
            return $GLOBALS['globalProperties'][$name][$obj_id];
        },
        'set' => function($obj, $value) use ($name) {
            $GLOBALS['globalProperties'][$name][] = $value;
        }
    );
}

php_snmp_add_property(&$properties, 'number', array('1234'), example_add_property);

echo php_snmp_read_property('1234', 'number');
